properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origin-patterns
properties.description: Comma-separated CORS allowedOriginPattern values for /api/** (e.g. http://localhost:* for Vite on port 3000).

properties.name: app.security.api-protection
properties.description: Security mode: permit-all (default, dev) or jwt-api (OAuth2 Resource Server + Bearer JWT). Maps from env APP_SECURITY_MODE in application.properties.

properties.name: app.security.jwt.secret
properties.description: Symmetric HS256 secret (UTF-8, byte length >= 32) when api-protection=jwt-api. Prefer env JWT_SECRET.

properties.name: app.security.jwt.access-ttl-minutes
properties.description: Access JWT TTL in minutes (min 1). Issued at login/refresh. Env JWT_ACCESS_TTL_MINUTES overrides in application-postgres.

properties.name: app.cloudinary.enabled
properties.description: When true, registers Cloudinary SDK bean for Task039 multipart upload. Also set CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, CLOUDINARY_API_KEY, CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET (or app.cloudinary.*). Env CLOUDINARY_ENABLED.

properties.name: app.cloudinary.api-secret
properties.description: Cloudinary API secret. Env CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET. Do not commit.

properties.name: app.cloudinary.folder
properties.description: Folder prefix on Cloudinary (product id appended per upload). Env CLOUDINARY_FOLDER.

properties.name: app.cloudinary.max-file-size-bytes
properties.description: Max multipart image size in bytes before upload. Env CLOUDINARY_MAX_BYTES.
